content.en:
"The Ultimate Ancestral Technique is a difficult Ancestral Technique for other Ancestors to master, but for me, although it is also difficult, there is great hope!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Because he has several ultimate ancestral endowments, all of which are copied from the ancestral endowments of the Extinction Clan, and are constantly fused to form the ultimate ancestral endowment.

At present, he has five ultimate ancestral endowments: the Ultimate Strength Ancestor, the Ultimate Defense Ancestor, the Ultimate Speed Ancestor, the Ultimate Silence Annihilation Ancestor, and the Ultimate Time Ancestor.

Therefore, he had the hope of mastering these five types of Ultimate Ancestor Techniques, and the difficulty was at least a thousand times lower than that of other Ancestors.

Of course, it was impossible for Ye Tian to pin all his hopes on the Ultimate Ancestral Technique, what if the time of a hundred realm years was not enough?

Therefore, he must also improve his cultivation.

"It's not easy to improve the cultivation of the first ancestor, you have to rely on the Silent Treasure!"

Ye Tian thought.

Now that the human race has mastered the Dark Soul Domain, if he creates a large area of Silent Time and Space, and uses many high-level resources to derive the Silent Time and Space, and creates more Silent Resources, all of them will be used by the doppelganger Aoba Ancestor to improve the cultivation of the Aoba Ancestor.

One hundred realm years is enough to make the cultivation of the doppelganger Aoba Ancestor soar, and the strength is very likely to be raised to the elite domain ancestor realm, if you master an ultimate ancestor skill, then the combat power will soar to be comparable to the combat power of the realm ancestor.

At that time, he will be able to use the Dark Soul Domain to compete with top ancestors such as the Holy Ancestor and the Ancestor of Destruction.

this day.

Ye Tian used the Ultimate Ancestral Wealth level of the Eternal Ancestral Endowment to start creating a Silent Destruction Space-Time, which was larger than the previous Silent Destruction Space-Time and Space, and it was easier to give birth to high-quality Silent Destruction Treasures.

After all, even the Silent Annihilation Clan does not have the ultimate Ancestral Ancestral Endowment level of the Silent Ancestral Fu!

The task of the doppelganger Aoba Ancestor and Ye Tian's ontology is to deduce the Ancestor Method and the Ultimate Ancestor Technique, and the task of the doppelganger Aoba Ancestor is to refine the Silent Treasure and improve the cultivation.

In this way, a long time passed, and the population of the human race was terrifyingly promoted in the Dark Soul Domain, and the Terran who was born later was also regarded as the native inhabitants of the Dark Soul Domain, and was recognized by the Dark Soul Domain.

And with sufficient resources, it almost dominates a dark holy land, so the strength of the human race has long surpassed the ordinary holy gate.

Under such circumstances, the human race also gave birth to one holy land-level force after another.

Of course, the most powerful force is the Terran Temple, and any Terran power must be under the jurisdiction of the Temple.

And even if those Superior Domain Ancestors established their power, they must also be named in the Temple.

Almost all of these Peerless Domain Ancestors were cultivated by Ye Tian, so naturally they didn't dare to have any thoughts.

A realm year passed quickly.

For many human races, this is an incomparably long period of time, and in such a long time, the human race only has three more superior domain ancestors.

This is a very slow speed for Ye Tian, but for those Holy Gates, three peerless domain ancestors are born in a realm year, this is a very fast speed, if this speed can be maintained, how terrifying it is!

But in the later days, a realm year may not be able to give birth to a higher-level domain ancestor.

This is not just a restriction of the luck of the race, but also a limitation of a dark holy land.

In the time of a realm year, Ye Tian had refined a large number of Peerless Extinction Treasures, and if he gave it to a Peerless Domain Ancestor who could refine a Transcendent Treasure of Silence, he could almost create hundreds of Peerless Peak Domain Ancestors.

But with so many Silent Treasures, they only increased the strength of the clone Aoba Ancestor several times, and the further they got, the slower they became.

"Fortunately, the quality of the treasure resources that have been born in the Dark Soul Domain recently is higher, and the quality of the Silent Treasures cultivated in the future will also be even higher. Moreover, the longer the Extinction Plane operates, the higher the Extinction Treasure will be. Moreover, the time and space of extinction here is different from the time and space of extinction at the edge of the dark forbidden realm, there are a large number of time and space of extinction there, plus the ancestors cut leeks, so that the energy of extinction there cannot grow. But I kept pouring resources into it, and the energy of extinction kept skyrocketing. At this rate, it is definitely possible to cultivate top-level Silence Treasures, and it is a large number of top-level Silence Treasures. In a hundred realm years, I can definitely accumulate my cultivation strength to the elite domain ancestor level!"

Ye Tian said with full confidence.

However, after such a long time, Ye Tian still hadn't advanced an ancestral technique to the ultimate ancestral technique realm, but he frowned a little.

Moreover, Ye Tian's own Ancestor Law Creation was also a little frowned, but it was just a few eyebrows, and it would take longer to create and deduce.

Two realms have passed!

Three realms have passed!

Ten realms have passed!

Before you know it, eighteen realm years have passed in the Dark Soul Domain.

On this day, Ye Tian laughed loudly, and his voice spread throughout the entire Primordial Ancestral Realm.

The reason why he was so excited was that he had finally created an Ultimate Ancestral Technique.

This ancestral technique is based on the deduction of the ancestral armor, after his eighteen realm years of deduction, I don't know how many times he has broken the copy body, and this has evolved the ultimate ancestral technique - the ultimate ancestral armor!

"I have the ultimate power of the Ultimate Ancestral Endowment level, and I have used the Divine Soul Derivation and Deduction of the Replicating Body again and again, exhausted the power of the Holy Soul countless times, and it took eighteen realm years to deduce the Ultimate Ancestral Technique, destroying the Ancestor and the Holy Ancestor, and the Realm Ancestor, if they don't have a great opportunity, I'm afraid that 100,000 realm years or a million realm years will not be able to create the Ultimate Ancestral Technique. And it seems that the birth of the Dark Sanctuary has only been hundreds of thousands of realm years, and they have actually mastered the Ultimate Ancestral Technique, which is definitely a great opportunity that I can't imagine!"

Ye Tian guessed.

However, he didn't speculate about the great opportunity of the Holy Ancestor and the Destruction of the Ancestor, in short, no matter how great the opportunity was, it was not as great as the opportunity to copy the talent.

And now, he has created the Ultimate Ancestor Armor, just the defense part, it has reached a terrifying level, unless the Holy Ancestor and the Destruction Ancestor, the other Ancestors can't hurt him in the slightest, if he borrows the power of the Dark Soul Domain, the Holy Ancestor and the Destruction Ancestor can't kill him.

"In the Dark Soul Domain, the Holy Ancestor and the Ancestor of Destruction can't kill me, but they can kill the human race, and I must also master an attack-type Ultimate Ancestor Technique!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

So, he began to study the Ultimate Ancestral Technique of Strength.

Once he created an attack-type power Ultimate Ancestor Technique, under the amplification of the Dark Soul Domain, his combat power soared to a level comparable to that of the Destruction Ancestor and the Saint Ancestor, even if it was weaker, it would not be too weak.
